privileged_info_for_vlm: The SAST scanner code and test suite are synthetically generated. The 5 critical bugs (match/case, variable scope leakage, import aliases, f-strings, and hardcoded secrets) are explicitly commented in visitor.py. The agent must use VS Code to edit visitor.py and run pytest on tests/test_visitor.py to verify the fixes. Note: The programmatic verifier is missing from the environment, making visual verification of the pytest output the only way to confirm success.
